scenes.name: Land on visualizer
scenes.note: Hold on the default Bars mode and dark stage so the viewer orients to the product layout.

scenes.name: Switch to Wave mode
scenes.note: Start the journey by showing that visual modes are instantly switchable.

scenes.name: Observe wave mode
scenes.note: Notice the active mode changes while the large canvas remains the focus.

scenes.name: Switch to Spectrogram
scenes.note: Show a second mode to communicate range across the seven visualizers.

scenes.name: Observe spectrogram option
scenes.note: Notice how the mode bar makes rapid experimentation easy.

scenes.name: Switch to Radial
scenes.note: Move into a more stylized layout to vary the visual rhythm of the demo.

scenes.name: Observe radial mode
scenes.note: Notice the one-click mode switching without leaving the main stage.

scenes.name: Change palette
scenes.note: Demonstrate palette personalization using one of the visible color chips.

scenes.name: Observe palette transition
scenes.note: Notice the color theme change across the interface and canvas area.

scenes.name: Switch aspect to square
scenes.note: Show that the stage can be reframed for different output formats.

scenes.name: Observe square framing
scenes.note: Notice the aspect-ratio controls reshape the canvas presentation instantly.

scenes.name: Switch aspect to vertical
scenes.note: Highlight the mobile-first export format mentioned in the product description.
